exercises.code:
import unicodedata
a = "José"
b = "Jose\u0301"
print("sin norm:", a == b)
na, nb = unicodedata.normalize("NFC", a), unicodedata.normalize("NFC", b)
print("NFC:", na == nb, na)
exercises.justification_from_packet: José vs Jose+combining accent fallan en == por NFC vs NFD; normaliza Unicode. NFC alinea formas Unicode antes de comparar.

print("MAÑANA".casefold() == "mañana".casefold())
exercises.justification_from_packet: José vs Jose+combining accent fallan en == por NFC vs NFD; normaliza Unicode. casefold para comparación case-insensitive más fuerte que lower.
José vs Jose+combining accent fallan en == por NFC vs NFD; normaliza Unicode. soft_eq = NFC + casefold.

exercises.code:
import unicodedata
raw = "María del Carmen Quispe Huamán"
norm = unicodedata.normalize("NFC", " ".join(raw.split()))
toks = norm.split()
if len(toks) < 2:
    print("review: un solo token", raw)
else:
    apellidos = toks[-2:]
    given = " ".join(toks[:-2])
    print("given:", given)
    print("apellido1:", apellidos[0], "apellido2:", apellidos[1])
print("raw conservado:", raw)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Un solo token de nombre → review y conserva raw; no inventes apellidos. Split NFC; conserva raw; tokens de apellidos al final.
Un solo token de nombre → review y conserva raw; no inventes apellidos. Un token → review; no inventar apellido2.

exercises.code:
raw = "  Jr.  de  la  Unión   450  "
limpio = " ".join(raw.strip().split())
print(limpio)
print(limpio.replace("Jr.", "Jiron"))
print("find Unión:", limpio.find("Unión"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: replace/split bastan para transformaciones literales simples; regex para patrones. strip/collapse, replace literal, find.

exercises.code:
import re
pat = re.compile(r"DNI\s+(?P<dni>\d{8})\b")
text = "Cliente demo DNI 12345678 activo"
m = pat.search(text)
print(m.group("dni") if m else None)
print("fullmatch solo digitos:", bool(re.fullmatch(r"\d{8}", "12345678")))
print("fullmatch con prefijo:", bool(re.fullmatch(r"\d{8}", "DNI 12345678")))
exercises.justification_from_packet: fullmatch exige que toda la cadena cumpla; 'DNI 12345678' no fullmatch de \d{8}. search extrae; fullmatch exige cadena entera.

exercises.code:
import re
print(bool(re.fullmatch(r"\d{8}", "12345678")))
print(re.fullmatch(r"\d{8}", "DNI 12345678"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: fullmatch exige que toda la cadena cumpla; 'DNI 12345678' no fullmatch de \d{8}. fullmatch de 8 dígitos falla con prefijo DNI.

exercises.code:
import re
def extract_dni(text):
    m = re.search(r"\b(\d{8})\b", text)
    return m.group(1) if m else None
print(extract_dni("doc 87654321 ok"))
print(extract_dni("sin numero"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: fullmatch exige que toda la cadena cumpla; 'DNI 12345678' no fullmatch de \d{8}. Extrae DNI de 8 dígitos con search y word boundary.

exercises.code:
import re
phone = re.compile(r"\b9\d{8}\b")
log = "ok 999111222 noise 12345 otro 988777666"
print("findall:", phone.findall(log))
for m in phone.finditer(log):
    print(m.group(), "at", m.start())
exercises.justification_from_packet: fullmatch exige que toda la cadena cumpla; 'DNI 12345678' no fullmatch de \d{8}. findall/finditer de celulares 9xxxxxxxx.

exercises.code:
rows = [
    {"pred": "match", "truth": "match"},
    {"pred": "match", "truth": "no"},
    {"pred": "no", "truth": "match"},
    {"pred": "match", "truth": "match"},
]
tp = sum(1 for r in rows if r["pred"]=="match" and r["truth"]=="match")
fp = sum(1 for r in rows if r["pred"]=="match" and r["truth"]=="no")
fn = sum(1 for r in rows if r["pred"]=="no" and r["truth"]=="match")
print("tp", tp, "fp", fp, "fn", fn)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Jaccard intermedio va a review con evidencia; no fusión automática ni parentesco. Conteos TP/FP/FN sobre labels sintéticos.

exercises.code:
tp, fp, fn = 2, 1, 1
prec = tp / (tp + fp)
rec = tp / (tp + fn)
print(round(prec, 3), round(rec, 3))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Jaccard intermedio va a review con evidencia; no fusión automática ni parentesco. precision y recall desde tp/fp/fn.
